hero.deck: Our goal is to build a better future for our children by improving the quality of education in Egypt.

aboutUs.caption: Together towards a better future for our children.
aboutUs.headline: Delta American Schools – Mansoura
aboutUs.body: Delta American Schools in Mansoura is a leading educational institution dedicated to providing high-quality American-based education. With over 25 years of experience, the school combines global teaching standards with a supportive and inclusive learning environment.
aboutUs.vision: To be recognized as a center of educational excellence that inspires lifelong learning, critical thinking, and global citizenship.
aboutUs.mission: Our mission is to deliver an outstanding American curriculum that nurtures creativity, confidence, and character in every student.

kg.title: Kindergarten
kg.excerpt: Nurturing curiosity, creativity and early childhood development.

primary.title: Primary
primary.excerpt: Building strong academic foundations with a focus on core skills and character.

prep.title: Preparatory
prep.excerpt: Developing independent thinkers ready for the demands of secondary education.

secondary.title: Secondary
secondary.excerpt: Preparing graduates to lead with confidence in a global world.

whyDelta.intro: We create a supportive environment that helps every child grow confidently. Delta Schools provides high quality education with modern teaching methods.

f1.title: Development Focus
f1.body: At DAS we are committed to the continuous development of the education system.

f2.title: Education Experts
f2.body: DAS offers top notch instructors dedicated to delivering exceptional learning outcomes.

f3.title: Security Focus
f3.body: At DAS we ensure a safe environment with cameras monitoring the campus.

f4.title: Student Activities
f4.body: At DAS we offer student activities that encourage learning, creativity and teamwork.

f5.title: International Accreditation
f5.body: The school is accredited by prestigious international bodies such as Cognia (formerly known as AdvancED), which ensures quality education and management standards.

cta.headline: A better future starts with
cta.body: Join the Delta American Schools family and give your child the education they deserve.

feedback.intro: Reviews & Feedback — We value the trust parents place in Delta School.

t2.text: I have worked here for years and I would like to tell you that this school is one of the best quality schools in Egypt. Don't hesitate to apply for your child here.

sendAdmission.title: Send Admission Papers – Delta American Schools
sendAdmission.headline: Send Admission
sendAdmission.deck: Submit your child's documents securely. Our admissions team will review your submission and contact you within 2–3 business days.
sendAdmission.dropHint: PDF, ZIP or RAR — max 10 MB
sendAdmission.successMsg: Our admissions team will contact you within 2–3 business days.
sendAdmission.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sendVisit.title: Book a Campus Visit – Delta American Schools
sendVisit.headline: Book a Campus
sendVisit.deck: Choose your preferred date and we will confirm your appointment. Experience our classrooms, facilities, and campus environment up close.
sendVisit.successMsg: Thank you. We will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your visit.

masthead.headline: Our
masthead.deck: Choose the service that suits you — whether you want to apply, use the smart assistant, communicate with the school, or book an appointment to visit the campus.

c1.desc: Upload the required documents and complete your application data electronically in an organized way, with step-by-step tracking of your request status.

c2.desc: Get instant answers to your questions about the school, regulations, curriculum, and fees through a smart assistant available to you 24/7.

c3.desc: Easily contact the admissions team or parent services, and get reliable official answers from school management.

c4.desc: Choose the appropriate day and time to visit Delta American Schools and get to know the classrooms, activities, and educational environment up close.

masthead.headline: About
masthead.deck: Meet the founders, faculty, and students who make Delta American Schools one of Egypt's most distinguished educational institutions.

f1.name: Dr. Mohamed Rabie Nasser
f1.bio: Dr. Mohamed Rabie Nasser is a pioneer of private education in Egypt. He serves as Chairman of the Board of Trustees at Delta University for Science and Technology and is the founder of Delta Academy and Sphinx and Nile Valley Universities. He is known for his initiatives to support these efforts, most notably the Mohamed Rabie Award for Scientific Research, which recognizes outstanding researchers in the fields of medicine, technology, and artificial intelligence.

f2.name: Dr. Ahmed Abu El-Fotouh
f2.bio: Dr. Ahmed Abu El-Fotouh is an academic professor and Dean of the Delta Higher Institute for Computer Science and Management Information Systems in Mansoura. He is a key educational leader in the "Delta" group and is responsible for the technical and administrative supervision of the institute's engineering departments and the development of the scientific research system.

f3.name: Maj. Gen. Dr. Abdul Wahab Al-Ra'i
f3.bio: Major General Dr. Abdul Wahab Al-Ra'i is a distinguished security expert and academic with a 30-year career in the Ministry of Interior, specializing in organized crime with a 99% conviction rate. A recipient of the Presidential Medal of Excellence, he now serves as a senior academic and vice-dean, and is a recognized authority on intellectual security and legal legislation.

faculty.title: Our Faculty
faculty.headline: Get Quality Education
faculty.deck: Our teachers are dedicated specialists committed to nurturing the potential of every student. With their expertise and passion they create a supportive and engaging learning environment.

graduationTeam.title: Graduation Project Team
graduationTeam.headline: Get a Quality Website
graduationTeam.deck: These are the people who made this website possible — programmers, data analysts, and designers. These are some of our best students.

supervisionTeam.title: Supervision Team
supervisionTeam.headline: Get High Quality Supervision
supervisionTeam.deck: These two individuals were instrumental in leading a team of 20 people to bring this graduation project and website to life in the best possible way.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.headline: Milestones & Achievements
timeline.deck: Our journey began with a vision to provide quality education and has evolved into a comprehensive platform that connects students, teachers, and parents.

y2011.title: Foundation
y2011.body: Delta American School (DAS) was established in Mansoura, and is part of the Delta Educational Group. It began providing its distinguished educational services in 2011. But The parent educational group was established in 1998.

y2013.title: International Accreditation
y2013.body: Received full accreditation from Cognia, a globally recognized education quality body.

y2022.title: World Record
y2022.body: Entered the Guinness Book of World Records — a historic milestone for the school.

y2023.title: Top Academic Scores
y2023.body: Students achieved top scores in the ACT and SAT international examinations.

hero.deck: Accredited by the Ministry of Education and Cognia, Delta American School is known for providing high-quality education that focuses on social and emotional development.

req.title: Admission Requirements for Delta American School (2026)
req.intro: Delta American School follows standard procedures for international schools in Egypt, with specific requirements tailored to each academic stage. Below is a list of the essential documents and procedures required for enrollment.

d2.label: Personal Photos:
d2.body: 8 recent passport-sized photos of the student (white background).

d3.label: ID Copies:
d3.body: Valid National ID copies of both parents (Father & Mother).

d4.label: Educational Qualifications:
d4.body: Copies of university degrees for both parents.

d5.label: Passport (For Non-Egyptians):
d5.body: Copies of the student's and parents' passports with a valid residency permit.

t1.label: Success Certificate:
t1.body: An official transcript of the last academic year, stamped by the Educational Directorate.

t2.label: Student File:
t2.body: Withdrawal of the student's file from the previous school (after receiving the acceptance letter).

t3.label: Certificate of Good Conduct:
t3.body: Sometimes required for Middle and High School students.

p1.label: Application Form:
p1.body: Fill out the form via the school's website or at the school premises.

p2.label: Assessment:
p2.body: Schedule an entrance exam for the student in English, Mathematics, and Arabic.

p3.label: Parent Interview:
p3.body: A personal interview for the parents with the school administration.

info.note: It is always recommended to contact the school's Admissions Department directly to confirm deadlines, as the school may require specific updates or additional paperwork based on new Ministry of Education regulations.
